trades.reasoning: All 5 bullish signals confirmed — RSI 67.3 in the momentum sweet spot, MACD crossover with rising histogram, and volume surge — Intel is well-positioned to ride the semiconductor tailwind on a NASDAQ +1.2% day
Risk-on conditions strongly favor fintech; SOFI scores 100 with all 5 signals bullish including RSI 65.2 and volume surge, offering a clean technical entry with no overbought concerns
Perfect momentum score with all 5 signals firing including volume surge and RSI 65.4 — speculative small-cap but technically the cleanest setup on the board today

decisions.briefing: Risk-on day with NASDAQ up 1.2% and S&P up 0.7%, giving clear runway to deploy the $943 in idle cash. Targeting three score-100 candidates — INTC, SOFI, PCT — all with RSI in the bullish zone (not overbought) and volume confirmation, avoiding the crowded overbought names scoring 75 with RSIs above 80. One position slot held in reserve for emerging opportunities.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly today with the NASDAQ leading at +1.2%, driven by renewed appetite for growth and technology stocks as risk sentiment improved. Semiconductor and fintech names outperformed as investors rotated into higher-beta positions, reflecting confidence in the near-term macro backdrop. The S&P 500 lagged slightly at +0.7%, suggesting the outperformance was concentrated in tech-heavy sectors rather than a broad defensive advance.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日全線上揚，以科技股為主的納斯達克指數領漲1.2%，投資者重拾風險偏好，積極買入成長股與科技類股。半導體及金融科技板塊表現突出，顯示市場對短期宏觀環境抱持信心。標普500指數漲幅略遜，僅上升0.7%，反映今日升勢主要集中於科技相關板塊，而非全面性的防守型反彈。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy of buying stocks that are already trending upward, based on the idea that winners tend to keep winning in the short term. Today's top picks (INTC, SOFI, PCT) were selected because their RSI sits in the 'sweet spot' of 55–70 — strong enough to confirm upward momentum but not yet overbought — while MACD crossovers and volume surges add further confirmation. The key risk is that momentum can reverse sharply, which is why stop-losses are essential.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資是一種追買強勢股的策略，核心邏輯是「強者恆強」——已在上升趨勢中的股票，短期內往往會繼續上漲。今日精選的INTC、SOFI和PCT，其RSI均處於55至70的「黃金區間」，動能確立但尚未超買，配合MACD金叉及成交量放大訊號，為入市提供多重技術確認。然而動能可急速逆轉，因此設置止蝕位至關重要。
